title: Unlit Campfire Icons
description: Resource pack that removes the fire of the campfire icons.
body:
# Unlit Campfire Icons

This resource pack removes the fire of the campfire icons. Neither more nor less.

It changes the icons to match the mod [Unlit Campfire](https://modrinth.com/mod/unlit-campfire).

![The item icons of both vanilla campfires are changed.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20af21a2022bcf56a4d2ce135e1ebbc81bf2cc38.png)

If there are any problems, please contact me via Discord or with a Github Issue.

You need a server? Save 25% on [Bisect Hosting with the promo code "cech12"](https://bisecthosting.com/cech12?r=modrinth-unlit-campfire-link)!
